articles.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance
articles.summary: Google announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets that enable users to create, organize and edit entire sheets through natural language descriptions. The system can handle basic tasks to complex data analysis.

articles.title: Google's Gemini AI is getting a bigger role across Docs, Sheets, and Slides
articles.summary: Google is embedding Gemini AI more deeply within Workspace apps, including a new chat window in Docs, AI-generated spreadsheets, and enhanced Drive search. These features are rolling out to Google Workspace and AI plan subscribers.

articles.title: Yann LeCun's AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
articles.summary: AMI Labs, the new venture co-founded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after leaving Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation. The company focuses on building world models for AI systems.

articles.title: Under the hood: Security architecture of GitHub Agentic Workflows
articles.summary: GitHub details the security architecture behind Agentic Workflows, featuring isolation, constrained outputs, and comprehensive logging. The system uses a threat model and security architecture to help teams run agents safely in GitHub Actions.

articles.title: You can now ask Photoshop's AI assistant to edit images for you
articles.summary: Adobe announced agentic AI features for Creative Cloud apps, allowing users to edit images by describing changes to a chatbot. A native AI assistant is now available in public beta for Photoshop on web and mobile.

articles.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
articles.summary: Anthropic launched Code Review in Claude Code, a multi-agent system that automatically analyzes AI-generated code and flags logic errors. The tool helps enterprise developers manage the growing volume of code produced with AI assistance.

articles.title: ARC-AGI-2 Technical Report
articles.summary: A transformer-based system that advances ARC performance by combining neural inference with structure-aware priors and online task adaptation. The approach reformulates ARC reasoning as a sequence modeling problem using structured representations.

articles.title: Autonomous AI Agents for Option Hedging: Enhancing Financial Stability through Shortfall Aware Reinforcement Learning
articles.summary: Introduces two reinforcement learning frameworks for derivatives markets that prioritize shortfall probability and align learning objectives with downside-sensitive hedging. The approach addresses the gap between static model calibration and realized hedging outcomes.

articles.title: Best-of-Tails: Bridging Optimism and Pessimism in Inference-Time Alignment
articles.summary: Addresses the fundamental dilemma in inference-time alignment where optimistic approaches suffer from reward hacking while pessimistic methods stifle exploration. Proposes a method to balance these competing objectives for better LLM alignment.

articles.title: YouTube is expanding its AI deepfake detection tool to politicians and journalists
articles.summary: YouTube's likeness detection feature will expand to a pilot group of journalists, government officials, and political candidates. The tool allows tracking of AI-generated deepfakes of themselves on the platform.

articles.title: OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to secure its AI agents
articles.summary: OpenAI's acquisition of Promptfoo underscores how frontier labs are scrambling to prove their technology can be used safely in critical business operations. The deal focuses on securing AI agent deployments.

articles.title: Anthropic sues Defense Department over supply-chain risk designation
articles.summary: Anthropic filed suit against the Department of Defense after being labeled a supply-chain risk. The complaint calls the DOD's actions unprecedented and unlawful, with over 30 OpenAI and Google employees supporting Anthropic's position.

articles.title: Production query plans without production data
articles.summary: Discussion of techniques for analyzing database query performance without exposing sensitive production data.
